name: Apricot & Cream Cheese Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 375°F.
2. Press dough into a greased 9-inch square cake pan.
3. Spread preserves evenly on dough.
4. In a small bowl, blend cream cheese, sugar, and orange juice until smooth; spread over preserves.
5. Cover; let rise in warm place until doubled about 30 minutes.
6. Sprinkle almonds on top.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes until lightly browned. Serve warm or cold.
